meta.tagline: Webflow + AI Sites for Coaches & Consultants
meta.description: Premium Webflow websites with integrated AI, delivered in 5 days. Coaches, consultants, therapists: stop losing clients to a mediocre website.

headline: Your expertise deserves
a site to match.
hero.subheadline: Premium Webflow · Integrated AI · Delivered in 5 days flat. I build websites that bring you clients while you sleep — for coaches and consultants who are tired of losing leads.
hero.trust: Figma design approved before dev · AI copy included · On-page SEO · 50% upfront · Zero hidden fees

logosBar.label: Stack used by the world's best web agencies

headline: Your website is
costing you clients.
problem.intro: You've spent years building your expertise. But every week, prospects land on your site, fail to grasp your value in 5 seconds, and leave for a less qualified competitor. That's money evaporating in silence.

points.title: An outdated site = an untrustworthy expert
points.desc: A 2019 Wix or an unmaintained WordPress sends a silent but devastating signal: 'I don't take my professional presence seriously.' Your prospects make the same shortcut.

points.title: No booking system = lost leads
points.desc: Without an integrated Calendly, an AI chatbot to answer at 11pm, or a visible CTA above the fold — visitors leave and never come back. Every unconverted visit is a missed appointment.

points.title: The redesign you've been postponing for 2 years
points.desc: Agencies want 6 to 8 weeks, €8,000 minimum, and three project managers. Result: it's still on your 'someday' list. That day is now — delivered in 5 days.

headline: 5 days.
Zero surprises.
process.subtitle: No 3-hour scoping meeting. No endless back-and-forth. A 5-step process refined across dozens of projects — you know exactly where we stand every day.

steps.title: Express brief — 30 min
steps.desc: You fill in a Notion questionnaire at your own pace (20 min), then we have a 30-min call. I understand your positioning, ideal client, and business goals. Everything else is on me.

steps.title: Figma mockup — approved before dev
steps.desc: I select the premium template suited to your sector and transform it to your identity: colours, typography, structure, sections. You approve visually. Not one line of code until you say go.

steps.title: AI copy optimised for conversion
steps.desc: I write all your site content with AI: hook, service pages, about, structured testimonials, SEO meta descriptions. Text designed to convince, not just fill space.

steps.title: Webflow development
steps.desc: The design goes into dev. Fully responsive, optimised Core Web Vitals, AI chatbot configured (24/7 answers), Calendly integrated for direct booking. Zero fragile plugins.

steps.title: Launch + training
steps.desc: Your site goes live on your domain. I train you in 30 min on Webflow's editor so you can update your own content without touching code. You're 100% autonomous.

headline: 3 clear offers.
0 hidden fees.
offers.subtitle: Every offer includes a Figma design approved before development, AI copy optimised for conversion, and on-page SEO. 50% upfront, 50% on delivery.

Basic FAQ chatbot (Tidio — answers in your absence)
1 round of revisions included

Multi-page Figma design approved BEFORE development
Complete Webflow development, Core Web Vitals optimised
Complete AI copy for all pages (conversion-focused)
AI Chatbot (Tidio/Crisp) — answers and qualifies 24/7
Technical + on-page SEO across all pages
Google Analytics 4 set up and running
Integrated Calendly — direct booking without email ping-pong
Webflow CMS Blog — ready to publish your articles
Smart forms + instant email notification
2 rounds of revisions included
Webflow Editor training 30 min — you're fully autonomous
items.forWho: Coaches, consultants, therapists with 3+ years of experience who want a site that works for them.

items.name: Full Growth
items.description: For established consultants and trainers who want to go beyond a great-looking site and build a real acquisition system. Every visitor enters a funnel — and exits as a qualified lead in your inbox.

Advanced AI chatbot — handles objections and books appointments

addon.title: Monthly maintenance
addon.note: Available for all clients. Your site evolves with you — no surprises.
features: Webflow hosting included
Content updates (text, images, new sections)
Minor design fixes and tweaks

items.quote: In 5 days I had a site I was proud to share. 3 weeks after launch, I had 4 new clients who found me on Google. The investment paid for itself.
items.name: Sophie M.

items.quote: I was worried speed would mean cutting corners. The Figma mockup reassured me immediately — it was exactly what I had in mind. The final result exceeded my expectations.
items.name: Thomas R.

items.quote: The chatbot answers my prospects when I'm in sessions. I received a signed coaching request on a Sunday morning at 9am. My old site would never have converted that.
items.name: Camille D.

about.headline: A senior freelancer. Not an agency.
paragraphs: I'm a Webflow webdesigner specialised in high-conversion sites for independent professionals. I've worked with Parisian Webflow agencies — I learned the processes, the quality standards, and above all what wastes 6 weeks unnecessarily.
Today I work directly with you. No middleman project manager, no juniors learning on your budget. From start to finish, you have one person responsible for the result.
I use AI as an acceleration tool: copy, SEO, chatbot, automations. Not to do less — to deliver more, faster, at a price agencies simply can't match.
about.currently: 🚐 Preparing a nomadic lifestyle — 100% remote from day one.

items.q: Is 5 days really achievable without cutting corners?
items.a: Yes — and it's achievable precisely because I don't start from scratch. I work with a library of 80+ premium templates (Temlis) built by expert design teams. I don't 'rush' — I deploy a proven system. What takes an agency 6 weeks takes me 5 days. You can see concrete examples during our call.

items.q: I don't have time to brief you. How does it work in practice?
items.a: The full brief happens in two steps: a Notion questionnaire you fill at your own pace (20-25 min), then a 30-min call to clarify. That's it. I don't need your copy, photos, or layout ideas — I handle all of that. The only other moment I involve you: approving the Figma mockup.

items.q: Will the site be genuinely unique or will I recognise the template?
items.a: Unique. The template is a structural and technical quality foundation — not a clone. I completely change colours, typography, illustrations, images, sections, animations and above all all the copy. If I show you two sites built on the same Temlis base, you won't be able to tell. Guaranteed, or I redo it.

Webflow generates clean code (no fragile plugins), excellent Core Web Vitals (Google ranks you higher), native security without monthly updates, and a visual editor to update your own content without a developer. It's the platform of choice for premium agencies and freelancers in 2025.

items.q: Can I edit the site myself after delivery?
items.a: Yes — and that's one of Webflow's major advantages. The content editor is as simple as a Google Doc: click on any text and edit it. I train you on it in 30 min at delivery. For structural or design changes, monthly maintenance is there.

items.q: What if I'm not happy with the result?
items.a: I have you approve the Figma mockup before writing a single line of code. If you approve the visual direction, the final result will align. The revisions included in each offer allow fine-tuning. To date, no project has been delivered without client satisfaction.
50% upfront at project start, 50% on delivery. Bank transfer or Stripe. I send an invoice within 24h of your commitment. Instalment payment available on request for Full Growth offers.

items.q: What are the hosting costs after delivery?
items.a: Webflow CMS plan costs approximately €23/month. You manage it directly, or I handle it as part of monthly maintenance. Your domain stays with your current registrar — no lock-in, your site is 100% yours.

cta.headline: 30 min to clear everything.
cta.subheadline: We look at your current situation together, I show you concrete examples in your niche, and we see if we're aligned. No commitment, no sales pitch.
cta.note: If I honestly think you don't need a new site, I'll tell you — and explain why.
checklist: 30-min call — no commitment or follow-up sales
Live audit of your current site (or competitors)
Concrete examples of sites in your niche
Clear proposal with exact deadline and price if we're aligned
cta.calendlyLabel: Prefer to pick your slot directly?

contact.headline: Tell me about your project.
contact.desc: I reply within 24 business hours with 2-3 available slots.
contact.successDesc: I'll reply within 24h with a few slots for our discovery call.
contact.spamNote: No spam. No sales follow-up. Reply within 24h.
